action.reasoning: Observation: ArcFace (iter 10) got 87.84% val vs cosine classifier's 89.10% (iter 8). ArcFace margin hurts on this task. Analysis: Need to return to cosine classifier and push feature quality higher. Using all 12 ViT layers (vs 7) provides more information. Mixup training + 3-layer MLP with 2 residuals adds capacity and regularization. Decision: Retrain with all 12 layers from both ViTs (19968-dim features), cosine classifier, 3-layer MLP, mixup training, 500 epochs with SWA.
